## Parsed type

All values of type `T` parsed to `[number, ScaleType]`<!-- -->-tuples.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type Parsed<T> = {
    [K in keyof T]-?: T[K] extends (Scale | undefined) ? (ParsedScale) : T[K] extends (Padding | undefined) ? (ParsedPadding) : T[K];
};
```
